turns.assistant_text:
Dưới đây là một số tin tức nổi bật về AI hôm nay:

1. **AI ad campaigns slam Trahan** - Một nhóm an toàn AI đã triển khai chiến dịch quảng cáo tấn công đại diện Lori Trahan, cho rằng bà đang ủng hộ các ông lớn AI trong các nỗ lực lập pháp của mình. [Đọc thêm](https://www.washingtonpost.com/wp-intelligence/ai-tech-brief/2026/06/01/ai-tech-brief-exclusive-ai-ad-campaigns-slam-trahan/) từ Washington Post.

2. **AI expected to drive £18bn of UK digital ad spend by 2030** - Dự báo rằng AI sẽ chiếm một phần ba chi tiêu quảng cáo kỹ thuật số tại Vương quốc Anh vào năm 2030, tương đương khoảng 18 tỷ bảng. [Chi tiết tại Marketing Week](https://www.marketingweek.com/iab-uk-ai-ad-spend/).

3. **Telstra elevates Dayle Stevens to company-wide AI role** - Telstra đã nâng cấp Dayle Stevens lên vị trí lãnh đạo AI toàn công ty, nhằm định hình chiến lược và chính sách xung quanh việc áp dụng AI. [Xem thêm tại iTnews](https://www.itnews.com.au/news/telstra-elevates-dayle-stevens-to-company-wide-ai-role-626326?utm_source=feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=iTnews+News+feed).

4. **NVIDIA releases new and updated tools for physical AI developers** - NVIDIA đã công bố các công cụ mới cho các nhà phát triển AI vật lý, giúp tăng tốc độ phát triển robot và phương tiện tự hành. [Tìm hiểu thêm tại The Robot Report](https://www.therobotreport.com/nvidia-releases-new-updated-tools-physical-ai-gtc-taipei-computex/).

5. **MazeBolt Launches RADAR VectorAI™** - MazeBolt đã ra mắt công cụ RADAR VectorAI™, cho phép tạo ra các cuộc tấn công DDoS do AI điều khiển. [Đọc thêm tại Business Insider](https://markets.businessinsider.com/news/stocks/mazebolt-launches-radar-vectorai-ai-powered-tool-that-crafts-ai-generated-attacks-1036216595).

Nếu bạn cần thêm thông tin chi tiết về một trong những tin tức này, hãy cho tôi biết!

items.title: AI & Tech Brief: Exclusive | AI ad campaigns slam Trahan - The Washington Post
items.summary: AI & Tech Brief from WP Intelligence. # AI & Tech Brief: Exclusive | AI ad campaigns slam Trahan. Plus, Anthropic files for a blockbuster initial public offering. Make us preferred on Google. Sign up here to get this newsletter in your inbox. * **Exclusive:** AI safety group Americans for Responsible Innovation rolls out a six-figure ad campaign this week attacking Rep. Lori Trahan (D-Massachusetts), arguing that she’s “taking the side” of AI oligarchs in her bipartisan legislative efforts. * The AI safety community doesn’t want to hand power of AI regulation to President Donald Trump’s administration now that states are passing more rigorous AI laws — and the California and New York attorneys general are challenging big AI companies. * Nvidia is rolling out a new “world model” simulator for robots and a new design platform for robot developers. In doing so, the company is running the same business playbook it did to become so dominant in the chip market.

items.title: AI expected to drive £18bn of UK digital ad spend by 2030 - Marketing Week
items.summary: # AI expected to drive £18bn of UK digital ad spend by 2030. IAB UK forecasts AI will drive one-third of UK digital ad spend by 2030 as advertisers adapt to changes in search, content and media buying. One-third (32%) of UK digital ad spend, equivalent to around £18bn, will be AI-driven by 2030, according to new forecasts from IAB UK. According to ‘The State of AI in Advertising: Charting the Shift from Automation to Autonomy, ‘ AI is expected to influence ad spend across four key areas– content creation, zero-click search, agentic trading and agentic commerce. To estimate the likely scale of change, IAB UK developed a series of ‘AI overlays’ that estimate the proportion of media spend by channel that is ‘AI-driven’, defined as a media buying and delivery decision made by an AI-powered algorithm. IAB UK forecasts most of the growth will come from the adoption of AI buying tools in search, such as Google’s AI Max and PMax; social, including Meta’s Advantage+; and display advertising through agentic programmatic buying.

items.title: Telstra elevates Dayle Stevens to company-wide AI role - iTnews
items.summary: ## Telstra elevates Dayle Stevens to company-wide AI role ## Cbus Super Fund's Group head of technology departs ## HBF faces AI agent to members for first time ## Microsoft backs down on legal threats against 0day disclosing researchers ## The hidden economics of AI: Why token usage matters more than you think. Telstra has elevated Dayle Stevens to a newly created enterprise-wide AI leadership role, after three-and-a-half years spent overseeing the Data & AI function. It’s understood that part of Stevens’ new role is to shape strategy and policies around broader AI adoption within Telstra in line with the telco’s Connected Future 30 strategy, of which AI is considered a central enabler. The expanded remit comes in the form of central oversight of both the Data & AI joint ventures with Quantium and Accenture. The Data & AI executive - Knox - also now has central oversight of the Telstra Quantium joint venture.

items.title: NVIDIA releases new and updated tools for physical AI developers - The Robot Report
items.summary: NVIDIA is offering AI agent tools to robotics and autonomous vehicle developers. revealed several open-source physical AI skills and tools to help developers of robotics, autonomous vehicles, visual AI, and industrial digital twins. Available as part of the NVIDIA Agent Toolkit, the new skills will let AI agents speed the data generation, simulation, training, evaluation, and deployment pipelines behind robots, autonomous vehicles (AVs), factories, and laboratories, said the company. “AI agents are revolutionizing software development, and that shift is now coming to physical AI, extending into the systems that will transform transportation, manufacturing, healthcare, and robotics,” said Jensen Huang, founder and CEO of NVIDIA, at GTC Taipei. “When agents can directly use NVIDIA libraries, models and frameworks, physical AI development will move faster, enabling developers to build the robots, autonomous vehicles, and industrial systems of the future at an incredible pace.”. NVIDIA said it is optimizing its entire physical AI stack for agents by turning libraries, models, and frameworks into agent-callable tools.

items.title: MazeBolt Launches RADAR VectorAI™: AI-Powered Tool That Crafts AI-Generated Attacks - markets.businessinsider.com
items.summary: # MazeBolt Launches RADAR VectorAI™: AI-Powered Tool That Crafts AI-Generated Attacks. RAMAT GAN, Israel, June 02, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- MazeBolt, the leading provider of AI-powered DDoS resilience solutions, today announced the launch of RADAR VectorAI™, a new MazeBolt module that creates AI-generated DDoS attacks. As AI outpaces human response, enterprises need to have access to validated DDoS vulnerability data about both known and AI-generated attack vectors. VectorAI functions as the “Mythos of DDoS,” providing enterprises with vulnerability data on deployed DDoS protections and how AI attacks can bypass them. “AI-driven cyber-attack capabilities are advancing faster than most enterprises are prepared for,” said Matthew Andriani, founder and CEO at MazeBolt. “As attackers gain the ability to deploy AI-orchestrated and AI-generated attacks, defenders need environment-specific validation to ensure their protections will hold up against both known threats and new, AI-generated threats.”. Attendees interested in learning how enterprises can continuously and nondisruptively validate DDoS vulnerabilities to maintain the business continuity of critical online services are encouraged to visit the booth or schedule a meeting with the team.

turns.assistant_text:
Dưới đây là 3 tweet mới nhất của Sam Altman:

1. **The OpenAI Foundation is doing a lot of wonderful things.**
   - Tóm tắt: OpenAI Foundation đang thực hiện nhiều điều tuyệt vời. Việc giúp xã hội trở nên kiên cường trước AI sẽ rất quan trọng. Còn nhiều điều hơn nữa sẽ đến!
   - Ngày: 01 tháng 6, 2026
   - [Xem tweet](https://x.com/sama/status/2061562575322492937) | Thích: 1940 | Retweet: 152 | Lượt xem: 282818

2. **OpenAI Robotics is hiring, looking for exceptional full-stack hardware, ops, systems, and ML engineers to help us program and manufacture robots that are useful for society.**
   - Tóm tắt: OpenAI Robotics đang tuyển dụng các kỹ sư xuất sắc để giúp lập trình và sản xuất robot hữu ích cho xã hội. Chúng tôi tập trung vào robot hỗ trợ công nhân lành nghề xây dựng cơ sở hạ tầng tương lai.
   - Ngày: 31 tháng 5, 2026
   - [Xem tweet](https://x.com/sama/status/2061117302528188712) | Thích: 13052 | Retweet: 1034 | Lượt xem: 2790909

3. **We want to help the world get a head start on biodefense:**
   - Tóm tắt: Chúng tôi muốn giúp thế giới có một khởi đầu tốt trong việc phòng thủ sinh học.
   - Ngày: 31 tháng 5, 2026
   - [Xem tweet](https://x.com/sama/status/2061101875303530871) | Thích: 1549 | Retweet: 176 | Lượt xem: 242497

Nếu bạn cần thêm thông tin hoặc muốn tìm hiểu về một tweet cụ thể, hãy cho tôi biết!

items.title: The OpenAI Foundation is doing a lot of wonderful things.
items.summary:
The OpenAI Foundation is doing a lot of wonderful things.

Helping society become resilient to AI is going to be incredibly important. Much more to come here!

items.title: OpenAI Robotics is hiring, looking for exceptional full-stack hardware, ops, systems, and ML engineers to help us progra
items.summary:
OpenAI Robotics is hiring, looking for exceptional full-stack hardware, ops, systems, and ML engineers to help us program and manufacture robots that are useful for society.

AI should be able to help people in the physical world. In the short term, we are focused on robots to support skilled workers to build our future infrastructure; in the long term, we imagine everyone having a personal robot doing anything they need.

Our world simulation research program, led by Aditya Ramesh (@model_mechanic), has evolved over the past year into OpenAI Robotics. Progress is rapid, and based on a foundation of co-design between robotics hardware and ML research.

If you love working hands-on across the robotics stack and want to build the future, please consider joining us. Send an email with your background and evidence of exceptional accomplishment to: robotics-recruiting@openai.com
